notes:
Fourteen campers at Camp Sweetgum, week of July 17-23, 1994.  Written by Marc Ostrom unless noted (I.R. = Ines Rocha).  Cabin assignments · Sturgeon (Sam + 5), Beaver (4), Osprey (2), Kestrel (2).  Each has:
  · knack        · the party skill they contribute
  · stat_spike   · their strongest stat (BODY/HEART/MIND/LUCK/SNEAK/KNACK)
  · preferred_items · four things they love as gifts (+1 friendship)
  · story_beat   · the moment where a specific dialogue choice grants +1
  · hello_line   · what they say when you first talk to them
  · has_ending   · true for the six with per-camper endings
  · cabin        · sturgeon | beaver | osprey | kestrel
  · bunk_pos     · [x,y] in Cabin Sturgeon for Sturgeon-mates · null otherwise

Wave C ships all fourteen defs, but only the five Cabin Sturgeon
bunkmates spawn as NPCs in the walkable zone.  The other nine live
in their cabins (Wave G authors those cabins) or in daytime activity
zones (Wave E+ authors those).

campers.notes: The player character.  Balanced stats.  A duffel bag with a slowstick called NORTHWIND HARBOR inside.  Has been thinking about Camp Sweetgum since April.  Not a party member · always leads.

campers.knack_desc: Scales short cliffs (BODY 3).  Opens the north bluff shortcut and the mess hall roof.
campers.story_beat: On Wednesday's hike, if Sam stops at the small boulder outcrop and tells Bea 'this one's a good one,' +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Hey Sam.  This morning I found a piece of jasper by the boat dock.  You want to see?
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm ochre · red hair · freckles · brown corduroy overalls

campers.knack_desc: Decodes archaic script (MIND 3).  Reads the Portuguese shanty, the Ghost Pirate coordinates, the caves' 1873 graffiti.
campers.story_beat: During Homesick Night on Tuesday, if Sam sits in silence with Wu Kai instead of asking a question, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: I brought this Ursula K. Le Guin.  A book, I mean.  I like it a lot.  Have you read her?
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool blue-gray · straight black hair · round wire glasses · a green sweater even in July

campers.knack_desc: Spots hidden objects (LUCK 3).  Bottles on the beach, nests with items, cave-wall markings.
preferred_items: unopened bag of shelled sunflower seeds
campers.story_beat: On Wednesday's hike, ask Elias to identify a bird you hear · +1 friendship.  Sit through his answer even if it goes long.
campers.hello_line: Sam!  I have counted six birds already this morning and I have been outside for eleven minutes.  Do you want to know all six?
campers.portrait_palette_hint: sandy tan · curly light-brown hair · binoculars around neck · a pale yellow shirt

campers.knack_desc: Reads tide charts and shipwrecks (MIND 3).  Opens the ghost ship's approach window and the shipwreck level of the caves.
preferred_items: smoked kipper (weird but he loves them)
campers.story_beat: On Thursday's free swim, if Sam asks Ford about the tide before wading, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam.  The tide is coming in at 6:14 this evening.  I have already told Jenny.  Jenny said thank you Ford.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool sea-blue · dark hair with a cowlick · navy t-shirt with a whale silhouette

campers.knack_desc: Distracts NPCs for a full turn (LUCK 3).  Steal back a confiscated item · slip past Bear · buy time in a chase.
campers.story_beat: On Thursday's talent show, if Sam laughs at Xavier's magic trick even though it 'goes wrong,' +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam!  Did you hear about the two campers who walked into a canoe?  ... okay I'm still working on the ending.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm rust · sandy blonde hair sticking up · a red bandana around neck · always mid-grin

campers.knack_desc: Shows counselor patrol paths (MIND 3).  Timing the Old Man dig · sneaking past Jenny · winning the scavenger hunt.
campers.story_beat: On Sunday's name game, if Sam remembers everyone's name after one pass, Tessa notices · +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam.  I have a plan for the scavenger hunt on Wednesday.  Do you want to hear the plan.  It has five steps.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool navy · dark bob cut · a purple hair clip · very serious face

campers.knack_desc: +2 to any social check (HEART 4).  Convincing counselors · getting kicked-out unstuck · defusing camper fights.
campers.story_beat: During any activity, if Sam publicly congratulates Marisol on winning, she says 'thank you Sam' · +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Hi Sam.  I saw you in the swim class this morning.  You're doing better than you think.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm terracotta · long dark hair · a woven ribbon woven in · calm smile

campers.knack_desc: Counselors lower guard (HEART 3).  Get out of trouble · get Bear to let you use the good canoe · avoid consequences.
campers.story_beat: During Homesick Night on Tuesday, if Sam sits with Danny on the bench, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam?  I really miss my mom.  Is it dumb to miss my mom.  I don't think it's dumb.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: muted mauve · light brown curls · reddened eyes · a threadbare bunny plush he carries

campers.knack_desc: Unlocks the boathouse (LUCK 3).  Opens the boathouse dungeon three days early · shortcut to the caves.
preferred_items: shrimp (which he claims are his favorite food)
campers.story_beat: On Tuesday's canoes, if Sam asks Reggie a genuine question about his dad's boat instead of the boat's specs, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam!  Did I tell you my dad has a 34-foot cabin cruiser?  Yeah.  A 34-foot.  Bertram.  Big one.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm khaki · sun-bleached blonde · a captain's cap tilted back · always a little sunburned

campers.knack_desc: Lures animals close (HEART 3).  The Alder Pond heron · the mess hall raccoon · a seal at the ghost ship.
campers.story_beat: On the way to any activity, if Sam sings along with Sylvie for one line, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam · [sings] · The wren, the wren, the king of all birds · that's a song my grandma taught me · do you know it?
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm honey · long straight black hair · a bright teal shirt · always mid-song

campers.knack_desc: Long underwater stretches (BODY 3).  The caves' underwater passage · retrieving items from the pond floor.
campers.story_beat: On Monday's swim class, if Sam publicly picks BEGINNER instead of ADVANCED, Ollie notices · +1 friendship.  This is the tell that lets you save him on Thursday.
campers.hello_line: Uh · hey Sam.  I'm doing advanced swim this week.  Yeah.  Advanced.  It'll be fine.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool gray-blue · dark buzz cut · a swim-team t-shirt that is a size too big · anxious eyes

campers.knack_desc: Notices trace substances (MIND 3).  Pond-scum on Wilson's boots · the buried bottle · the counterfeit twenty (later).
campers.story_beat: On Tuesday's tie-dye, if Sam warns Priya about the dye's sulfites BEFORE she reacts, +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam.  I already have a rash from the pillowcase.  I checked the label.  Look I brought my own pillowcase.  Do you want to see the label.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool violet · long dark braid · always in a long-sleeve linen shirt · thoughtful eyes

campers.knack_desc: Sees through disguises (MIND 3).  Recognizes Wilson's anchor tattoos · reads the pirate ledger · notices the fake map fold.
campers.story_beat: On Tuesday's tie-dye, if Sam praises Amelie's gray shirt as 'honest,' +1 friendship.  This is the line Ines Rocha named the KNACK after.
campers.hello_line: Hi Sam.  I am ten and my grandmother is from Coimbra.  She would like you.  She would say you have a good face for the coast.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: warm sepia · straight dark hair with a linen headband · a soft gray blouse · calm serious eyes

campers.knack_desc: Bypasses locked doors (SNEAK 4).  The boathouse · Wilson's cabin at 2 AM · east forest without a chase.
preferred_items: a lockpick (definitely not carried on her)
campers.story_beat: During Thursday's talent show, if Sam is sitting in the seat Nika vacated when she sneaks out, Nika later says 'you noticed' · +1 friendship.
campers.hello_line: Sam.  What are you doing at Camp Sweetgum.  Actually don't answer that.  Just · don't tell anybody I said hi.
campers.portrait_palette_hint: cool charcoal · short dyed-black hair · a beat-up leather jacket she isn't supposed to have · a pierced ear
